productDisplayName: Fila Unisex Solid Navy Blue Caps
description: Created using polyester fabric and mesh panels, this cap from fila is a perfect blend of comfort and style.Crown made of polyester fabric and mesh panels to offer breathable comfort to the headCurved visor with a polyester fabric upper and mesh on the peripheryTwill strap at the back with a buckle closure to customise the FitEmbroidered brand logo on the front of the crown for styleCap careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dry
